diagnostics.chalkiness_assessment: Very chalky: all 4/4 predicted Final Four teams were 1- or 2-seeds. The bracket leaned heavily on chalk.
diagnostics.upset_assessment: Under-picked upsets: only 8 upsets predicted. Tournaments historically average ~15–16 upsets (range 9–21). Note: fewer upset picks tends to improve bracket score because correctly predicting the specific upset is harder than picking the favorite.
diagnostics.sweet_16_double_digit_review: Predicted DD seed: T1443 (seed 11) (forced by structure constraint). This team did NOT reach the actual Sweet 16 in 1994.
diagnostics.champion_review: Champion incorrect: predicted T1181 (seed 2), actual champion was T1116. A seed-2 champion is uncommon but within the historical range.
